productDisplayName: Peter England Men Stripes Pink Shirt
description: Composition Pink shirt with blue stripes, made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fitting Slim Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry Warm iron Step into business, leisure and back in ease with this striped shirt from the Vitals collection of peter england. A shirt designed to suit your business hours and the time after that in style, this striped shirt is crafted from soft cotton fabric and stitched to perfection, offering exemplary comfort. Pair it with crisp formals, a blazer, classy accessories and rich leather shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
